title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive & Pocket - Some customers may experience print job release failures in the US hosting region — Resolved
summary:
This incident has now been fully resolved. We have confirmed that print jobs are releasing successfully for multiple customers.

Our apologies for any downtime that you experienced as a result of this outage. We will be performing a full retro, as we do with all issues that impact our customers.

If you experience other issues please report this via https://www.papercut.com/support/.

title:
Google Workspace: **Description**
We are experiencing intermittent errors with Google Docs, Apps Script, Google Slides, Google Drive, Google Calendar beginning on Friday, 2026-03-13 05:00 PDT.
Our engineering teams are actively working to mitigate the impact.
We will provide an update by Friday, 2026-03-13 08:00 PDT with current details.
We apologize to all who are affected by the disruption.
**Customer Symptoms**
A subset of customers may experience elevated error rates when accessing the impacted products in the US region.
**Workaround**
Impacted users may re-attempt the unsuccessful action. — Resolved
